title: iPhone 13 128GB
description: Well-maintained iPhone 13 with strong battery health and a clean display. Includes charging cable and protective case.

title: Nike Running Jacket
description: Lightweight running jacket in excellent condition. Great for morning workouts and folds into a small carry pouch.

title: Wooden Study Desk
description: Solid wood study desk with drawer storage. Minor wear on the surface, but sturdy and ideal for home office use.

title: MacBook Air M1
description: MacBook Air M1 with 8GB RAM and 256GB SSD. Smooth performance for school and office work, lightly used with charger.

title: Yoga Mat Pro

description: Minimal floor lamp with warm lighting. Works well in bedrooms or reading corners. Bulb included with the item.

description: Compact mirrorless camera suitable for travel and beginner photography. Includes strap, battery, and kit lens.

title: Adidas Football Boots
description: Comfortable football boots with good grip on turf. Some cosmetic marks, but plenty of life left for regular games.

title: Levi's Denim Jacket
description: Classic denim jacket in a versatile wash. Fits true to size and pairs well with casual outfits in any season.

title: Harry Potter Box Set

title: Bluetooth Speaker Mini
description: Portable Bluetooth speaker with solid battery life and clear sound. Great for desk use, travel, or small gatherings.
